role_in_text: quantum computing expert
occurrence_sentence: This concern is echoed by quantum computing expert Scott Aaronson, who notes, “If we want evidence that quantum computing could survive a collapse of P (problems solvable in polynomial time) and NP (nondeterministic polynomial time), we must also seek evidence that bounded-error quantum polynomial time (BQP) is a subset of PH (polynomial time hierarchy).”
